categories.label: Factual Q&A
categories.description: Direct factual questions about Azerbaijani history, culture, science, geography.

categories.label: Summarization
categories.description: Summarize a passage of Azerbaijani text in 2–3 sentences.

categories.label: Rewriting / Style
categories.description: Rewrite a sentence at a different formality level, simplify for a child, etc.

categories.label: Classification
categories.description: Classify sentiment, topic, or intent of a given Azerbaijani passage.

categories.label: Information Extraction
categories.description: Extract named entities, dates, or structured fields from a passage.

categories.label: Reasoning / Math Word Problems
categories.description: Multi-step reasoning or Azerbaijani-language arithmetic word problems.

categories.label: Creative Writing
categories.description: Short poem, story opening, or slogan in Azerbaijani.

categories.label: Translation
categories.description: Azerbaijani ↔ English or ↔ Turkish translation with nuance.

categories.label: Refuse / Clarify
categories.description: Instruction is ambiguous or requests something harmful; model should clarify or decline.

categories.label: Multi-turn Follow-up
categories.description: Follow-up question that requires context from a prior turn.

categories.label: Culturally-grounded
categories.description: Prompts requiring knowledge of Azerbaijani traditions, food, music, geography, figures.

notes: Hand-write or heavily rewrite every example. Track category label in each jsonl record.
